title: nginx won't start and systemctl start does nothing useful
description_md:
nginx should be running, but it isn't — and when you try `systemctl start nginx` it refuses in a way that confuses everyone. A previous admin 'made sure it could never start on its own' during an incident and never undid it. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), figure out what state the unit is in, undo it, and get nginx running.

You're done when `systemctl is-active nginx` reports `active`.
